case_title: CAMBRIDGE HOTEL, LTD. vs. GOODWIN, MARION et al

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GOODWIN, MARION

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMBRIDGE HOTEL, LTD. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-06-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO TEM: TONY MORALES/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR B. FIELDS 3:20PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND CASE SETTLED. PLFF'S COUNSEL MS. WOODS PRESENT AND DEFT MARION GOODWIN PRESENT, APPEARING IN PROPIA PERSONA. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ON RECORD, AS FOLLOWS: 1. PLFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMIES LOCATED AT 473 ELLIS T, #207, SF,CA; 2. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. 3. WRIT OF POSS ISSUE AND PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED TO 1/3/95. ATTYS FEES AND COSTS WAIVED AND EACH PARTY BEARS OWN ATTY'S FEE AND COST. 4. PLAINTIFF RETAIN DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT; PLFF DOES NOT WAIVE ANY RENT SF HSG AUTHORITY OWES TO PLFF. 5. DEFT WAIVES ANY AND ALL CLAIMS KNOWN AND UNKNOWN AGAINST PLFF AND HIS AGENTS, ETC. 6. DEFT REPRESENTS THAT THERE IS NO OTHER PERSON OCCUPYING THE PREMISES. (NOTE: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULALTION SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND SIGNED BY PRO TEM MORALES)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODWIN, MARION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS STREET,#207, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
